summary: Tested contact search name-only matching, keypad fixed-height layout, and campaign editor Preview Card feature. Fixed missing ScrollView import bug in UniversalShareModal. Backend: 8/8 tests passed for name-only contact search. Frontend: All features verified - Share My Card search, Add Contact search, Send Card search all use first_name/last_name only. Keypad has fixed 130px container for matching contacts. Campaign editor shows Preview Card button after selecting card type, modal displays card preview with icon, title, message, contact placeholder, and footer.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: UniversalShareModal.tsx was missing ScrollView import - added to line 12
PASS: Backend GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?search= correctly searches by first_name, last_name, phone only (not email or conversations)
PASS: UniversalShareModal.searchContacts uses backend ?search= parameter for strict name matching
PASS: ContactActionModal filtered array uses first_name and last_name only (lines 52-56)
PASS: filteredCardContacts for Send Card uses first_name and last_name only (lines 374-378)
PASS: Keypad matching contacts area is in a fixed 130px height View container so keypad buttons don't shift (line 273)
PASS: Search results in all modals use FlatList/ScrollView for scrollability
PASS: Campaign editor shows Preview Card button after selecting a card type (step-{n}-preview-card data-testid)
PASS: Preview Card modal displays card icon, title, sample message, contact name placeholder, and footer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact search name-only matching verified for all modals (Share My Card, Review Invite, Send Card, ContactActionModal). Keypad has fixed 130px height container so buttons don't shift when matches appear. Campaign editor Preview Card button works - clicking shows styled card preview modal. Fixed ScrollView import bug in UniversalShareModal.tsx.

backend_contact_search.test: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?search=Forest returns only contacts with Forest in first_name or last_name

frontend_share_modal_search.verification: Playwright - searched 'Forest' shows Forest Ward with phone number

frontend_add_contact_search.test: ContactActionModal filtered uses first_name and last_name only
frontend_add_contact_search.verification: Code review - lines 52-56 filter by first_name/last_name only

frontend_send_card_search.test: filteredCardContacts uses first_name and last_name only
frontend_send_card_search.verification: Code review - lines 374-378 filter by first_name/last_name only

frontend_keypad_fixed_height.test: Keypad matching contacts area is fixed 130px height
frontend_keypad_fixed_height.verification: Code review - line 273: View style={{ height: 130 }}

frontend_campaign_preview_card.test: Preview Card button appears after selecting card type, opens modal with styled preview
frontend_campaign_preview_card.verification: Playwright - clicked Preview Card, modal shows Birthday card with icon, title, message, contact placeholder, footer

bug_fixed.issue: ScrollView is not defined error in UniversalShareModal.tsx
bug_fixed.root_cause: ScrollView component was used on line 343 but not imported from react-native
bug_fixed.fix: Added ScrollView to the import statement from react-native on line 12
